[Primeira Parte]

              Cm     D7                  Gm7
I am thinking of you    in my sleepless solitude 
tonight
                  Cm      D7                     Gm7
if it's wrong to love you,   then my heart just won't 
let me be right
        Gm7/F          Eb7M                  D7
'cause I've drowned in you, and I won't pull through,
                  Gm
without you by my side.

             Cm      D7      Gm       Gm7/F      Eb7M

           Cm       F7(sus4)  Bb7M          Eb7M

song,
            Cm           D7     Gm

              Cm       D7              Gm
 Baby can you feel me,   imagining I'm looking in your

        Gm7/F      Eb7M                  D7
and yet you're so far like a distant star,
               Gm7
